59:1:4.m: in (connects السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens' to what comes before)

59:1:5.m: the heavens (possessed by/connected to something else)

59:1:10.m: The Mighty One (one of Allah's names)

59:1:11.m: The All-Wise (attribute of Allah, subject of هُوَ/He is)

59:2:7.m: people/family of (possessed by الكتاب - the Book)

59:2:9.m: from (showing that أَهْلِ comes from ٱلْكِتٰبِ)

59:2:18.m: that they (refers to those who disbelieved from the People of the Book)

59:2:23.m: and then he came to them

59:2:34.m: their houses (object of يُخْرِبُونَ - they destroy)

59:3:7.m: he would surely have punished them

59:3:9.m: the worldly life (as opposed to ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - the afterlife)

59:4:3.m: they opposed (اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ - Allah and His Messenger)

59:4:4.m: Allah (as the object being opposed in this verse)

َ: (as the object being opposed in this verse)

59:5:6.m: you all left it (referring to palm tree)

59:5:7.m: standing (feminine, describing how the palm trees were left)

ً: describing how the palm trees were left

59:5:9.m: its roots (referring to لِّينَةٍ - palm tree)

59:5:11.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)

59:5:13.m: the ones who break away from obedience (object of يُخْزِىَ - to disgrace)

فٰسِقِ: ones who break away from obedience

59:6:2.m: he caused to return back (subject: اللَّهُ)

59:6:3.m: Allah (as the subject of يُسَلِّطُ - gives authority)

59:6:13.m: any riding camels (in a possessive or descriptive phrase)

59:6:25.m: All-Powerful (describes Allah in 'Allah is All-Powerful over everything')

ٌ: (describes Allah in 'Allah is All-Powerful over everything')

59:7:2.m: He caused to return (subject of مَّآ)

59:7:3.m: Allah (as the subject of أَفَآءَ - granted as spoils)

59:7:9.m: then [it belongs] to Allah (connected to أَفَآءَ)

59:7:12.m: the close relatives (connected to ذِى meaning 'possessors of')

59:7:15.m: and the son (possessed by/connected to السَّبِيلِ)

59:7:19.m: that he becomes/exists (subjunctive after كَيْ لَا)

59:7:20.m: a means of circulating (wealth) (object of يَكُونَ - to be)

59:7:24.m: and what (referring to what the Prophet gave)

59:7:26.m: the messenger (subject of ءَاتَىٰكُمُ - what he gave you)

ُ: subject of ءَاتَىٰكُمُ - what he gave you

59:7:27.m: so take it! (command to many people)

59:7:32.m: and be cautious/fear! (command to a group)

59:7:33.m: Allah (as the object being feared in this verse)

َ: (as the object being feared in this verse)

59:7:35.m: Allah (as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟ - and fear)

َ: (as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟ - and fear)

59:8:6.m: their homes (belonging to those who were driven out)

59:8:8.m: they seek earnestly (referring to the poor emigrants)

59:8:9.m: a favor/bounty (object of يَبْتَغُونَ - they seek)

59:8:12.m: and great pleasure (as something they seek from Allah)

59:8:14.m: Allah (as the object of يَنصُرُونَ - they support)

َ: (as the object of يَنصُرُونَ - they support)

59:8:16.m: those (pointing to a group mentioned before)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to a group mentioned before)

59:9:10.m: to them (referring to the previous believers mentioned in وَٱلَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُو)

59:9:15.m: a need (object of يَجِدُونَ - they find)

59:9:25.m: and whoever (subject of يُوقَ - is protected from)

59:9:27.m: stinginess/greed (object of يُوقَ - is protected from)

59:10:8.m: for us/to us (object of اغْفِرْ - forgive)

59:10:10.m: those who (referring to the believers who came before)

نَ: (referring to the believers who came before)

59:10:22.m: Most Kind and Merciful (a name/attribute of Allah)

59:11:2.m: you see (after أَلَمْ which makes it negative)

59:11:4.m: those who (referring to the hypocrites mentioned in نَافَقُوا۟)

نَ: (referring to the hypocrites mentioned in نَافَقُوا۟)

59:11:21.m: forever (describes how long something will not happen)

ًا: (describes how long something will not happen)

59:11:24.m: we will most certainly help you all

59:11:25.m: And Allah (as the subject of يَشْهَدُ)

59:12:8.m: not (negates يَخْرُجُونَ - they will go out)

59:12:12.m: he will most certainly turn away

59:12:14.m: then, next, afterwards (shows something happens after something else)

ثُمَّ: then, next, afterwards (shows something happens after something else)

59:13:3.m: a single instance of fear (object of أَشَدُّ - more intense)

59:13:12.m: they understand deeply (subject of لَّا - they do not)

59:14:13.m: between them (who don't fight together in يُقٰتِلُونَ)

هُمْ: them (who don't fight together in يُقٰتِلُونَ)

59:14:18.m: scattered in different directions (with alif maqsura)

59:14:19.m: that one (pointing to something mentioned before)

59:14:20.m: because they (are قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ - a people who do not understand)

59:14:23.m: they use reason (referring to those who don't fight together)

59:15:4.m: before them (connected to مِن meaning 'from before them')

59:15:10.m: a punishment (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)

59:16:6.m: disbelieve! (command from قَالَ لِلْإِنسٰنِ - he said to mankind)

59:16:7.m: then when (connects to كَفَرَ - he disbelieved)

59:16:12.m: from you (being disassociated from by بَرِىٓءٌ)

59:16:13.m: indeed I (subject of أَخَافُ - I fear)

59:16:15.m: Allah (as the object being feared in إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ)

َ: (as the object being feared in إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ)

59:16:17.m: the worlds (possessed by رَبَّ - Lord of)

59:17:1.m: so he was (consequence of previous ayah)

59:17:6.m: both remaining permanently (describes two who are acted upon)

59:17:7.m: in it (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)

59:18:2.m: those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

59:18:3.m: they believed/had faith (subject of يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ - O you who)

59:18:5.m: Allah (as the object of اتَّقُوا - fear/be mindful of)

َ: (as the object of اتَّقُوا - fear/be mindful of)

59:18:11.m: and you all protect yourselves/be conscious (of Allah)

59:18:12.m: Allah (as the object being feared in ٱتَّقُوا۟)

َ: (as the object being feared in ٱتَّقُوا۟)

59:18:14.m: Allah (as the object being feared in this ayah)

َ: (as the object being feared in this ayah)

59:19:2.m: you all be (negative command with لَا)

59:19:7.m: their selves/souls (object of نَسُوا۟, they forgot)

59:19:10.m: the defiantly disobedient ones (predicate of هُمُ)

59:21:1.m: if (introducing a hypothetical situation that didn't happen)

59:21:4.m: the Quran (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)

59:21:9.m: in a state of splitting apart

59:22:5.m: any deity (object of لَآ meaning 'there is no')

59:22:12.m: The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)

59:22:13.m: The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)

59:23:5.m: any god or deity (object of لا)

59:23:6.m: except (in this ayah, excluding any deity from being worthy of worship except Allah)

59:23:7.m: he (subject of the sentence, referring to Allah)

هُوَ: he (subject of the sentence, referring to Allah)

59:23:8.m: The King (as a name of Allah)

59:23:10.m: The Perfect Peace (as a name of Allah, subject of هُوَ)

59:23:15.m: The Supreme One (who has true greatness) (one of Allah's names)

59:23:19.m: they associate partners (with Allah) (in response to سُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ)

59:24:1.m: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)

هُوَ: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)

59:24:7.m: the names (subject of لَهُ - belongs to Him)

59:24:8.m: the most beautiful/best names (referring to أَسْمَآءُ)

59:24:10.m: for him/to him (belonging to الْمُصَوِّرُ - the Fashioner)

59:24:11.m: whatever (is in the heavens and earth)

59:24:15.m: and He (referring to Allah in this context)

هُوَ: He (referring to Allah in this context)

59:24:16.m: The Mighty, The Undefeatable (name of اللَّهُ)

59:24:17.m: The Wise One (one of Allah's names)
